Urgent | Prime Minister of Lebanon: We will continue to mobilize basic efforts to secure Israeli withdrawal from all Lebanese territories

President Salam: We have begun preparing to restore all basic services, including water, electricity, and communications, and working to secure ready-made housing and everything necessary to provide a transitional phase.
President Salam to the people of the south: We will continue to open roads, remove rubble, and provide basic services to allow our people to return in safety and dignity to their homes and villages.

President Salam to the people of the south: We are here to confirm that we have begun to harness all the state’s capabilities to accompany your return. The Lebanese army and security forces are present to protect our returning people, in parallel with the completion of the army’s deployment.

President Salam: What we are witnessing is only the beginning, but we are determined and steadfast, and we will continue to mobilize all our political and diplomatic efforts to secure complete withdrawal from all Lebanese territory.
Urgent | Prime Minister of Lebanon: With the deployment of the Lebanese army in Zawtar Gharbiya, we will begin opening roads and providing services

President Salam to the people of the western town of Zawtar: This is a national moment that carries great political and moral dimensions because it represents the beginning of the Israeli withdrawal from our land.

RT by @lookner: First Red Sea diversions emerge According to #MarineTraffic data, the first operational response to heightened security risks in the Red Sea is now visible. Two laden crude tankers, the Singapore flagged XIN LONG YANG and the Liberia flagged RODOS, have altered their planned voyages after departing Saudi Arabia. XIN LONG YANG departed Yanbu, Saudi Arabia, on 20 July 2026 at 04:31 (UTC+3) with a reported destination of Qinzhou, China, before turning back in the Red Sea. RODOS departed Al Muajjiz, Saudi Arabia, on 20 July 2026 at 23:40 UTC with a reported destination of New Mangalore, India. Earlier today, at 09:17 UTC, RODOS updated her reported destination to the Suez Canal.

RT by @Faytuks: BREAKING via @CBSNews: Nearly 100 US service members have been injured in Iranian attacks on multiple bases in the Middle East this month, US officials told me. Some suffered traumatic brain injuries. Most have already returned to duty, two of the officials said.  Chief Pentagon Spokesman Sean Parnell confirmed the numbers in a statement to CBS. "While nearly 100 service members were deemed to have some degree of injury since July 7, 2026, 96% have returned duty. They are determined to get back in the fight. The vast majority of injuries experienced were minor concussions. Further updates will be posted on the Defense Casualty Analysis System. God is good!" Parnell said. https://www.cbsnews.com/live-updates/iran-war-trump-us-troops-killed-wounded-jordan-base/

RT by @IntelDoge: Thank you to our server member Obi for writing this briefing! You can stay up to date on the events in Ukraine by joining our #discord server! https://discord.gg/gHKpdkGQG

RT by @IntelDoge: Ukraine continued its ongoing campaign to strike tankers in the Sea of #Azov and the #BlackSea over the week. Multiple tankers were successfully struck by Ukrainian drones. These tankers are part of the Russian shadow fleet which is used to cirumvent sanctions.

RT by @IntelDoge: Drones struck the warehouse and set it on fire which resulted in a massive smoke plume that was very easily visible from space and across the southern sides of the Moscow suburbs. This warehouse served as a logistics hub helping to support the Russian war effort.
RT by @IntelDoge: Ukrainian forces launched a large scale drone attack on a massive #Wildberries warehouse outside of #Moscow, Russia which resulted in the complete destruction of the building.

RT by @IntelDoge: This attack came as Ukrainian forces are increasingly short on interceptor missiles which has resulted in a significant increase in the number of missiles getting through and striking their targets.
RT by @IntelDoge: Air attacks continued throughout the week while a massive ballistic missile attack took place on Saturday. 41 missiles targeted #Kyiv during the attack.

RT by @IntelDoge: Popular opinion both with citizens and with those who have or are actively enlisted in the Ukrainian military is largely negative of Syrskyi, and the dismissal of Fedorov this week has only reinforced that view. Russia did not slow down its attacks on Ukraine this week.
RT by @IntelDoge: The relatively sudden dismissal comes as a clear rift between #Fedorov and General #Syrskyi, who is in command of the #UkrainianArmedForces, came to a head.

RT by @IntelDoge: #Ukraine War Update July 18th, 2026 It has been an unsettled week in Ukraine following the ouster of Defense Minister Mykhailo Fedorov. Protests in support of Fedorov took place across cities in Ukraine and public figures spoke out in support of the former Defense Minister.
